entry.title: Want to disable or restrict the CTRL + N shortcut to prevent creating a new session in SAP
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We have implemented two-factor authentication, in which ,   the user logs in and an OTP popup is triggered. The OTP is sent to the respective mobile number and email. Once the OTP is entered, the user can access SAP. However,    a popup appears, and if the user presses CTRL + N, a new session opens and the POPup gets bypassed. This issue cannot be handled as it is not triggered during debugging, so we are unable to restrict or disable it.  Kindly give us any hint, as to how we can solve this issue. 

Regards,

Mehak

entry.title: PMMO can't support 415Q 412Q 161Q movetype
entry.content:
hi,expert I had actived PMMO (under Valuated stock mode) during our production system(we had go-lived for 3 mothons),but some movetypes (such as 415Q,412Q,161Q) are not supported by PMMO, why ? and how can I post this movetype's document ?

the follow is a example of the error message about 415Q

Transfer between grouped project stock and other stock type is not supported Message No. PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION060 Diagnosis When Project Manufacturing Management and Optimization (PMMO) is active in the system, stock transfer between grouped project stock and other stock types (such as plant stock) is not supported.

Fahad

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: As of now , In ADT you can drill down to the underlying table. And you can use the "where-used" feature in ADT to find CDS views using it and then check the API state .

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub & SAP SuccessFactors Learning Integration
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question about importing user data into LMS in new integrated learning. In the following print there are two ways to import user data based on EC or EP: with EC "Integration centre" and with EP "user data via SF user connector".

Does it mean that with EC sf-user connector won't be used? Is there any documentation that better describes how integration works with EC or EP?
Thank you.

The SAP Store Admin now cancelled my order the second time due to 'missing validations' (i provided my VAT tax certficate and explanations of my status as independent consultant in many emails)). Do you have an advice how i can complete the purchase? Best Regards Marcus

entry.content: Developer extensibility is really key for cloud ERP to be flexible to handle customer requirement, amazing demos.

entry.title: Re: SA 17.0.10.5866: Can't call my Web service, error “40...
entry.content:
A web client procedure cannot make an outbound HTTP request to itself; it cannot call a SQL Anywhere web service running on the same database. In the following steps, you create a new database, start a second database server, and connect to the new database.

Using the Database Server as a Web Client | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
You can wrap the CDS entity in your custom CDS view entity and then C1 release wrapper for usage in Tier 1 objects.

Example:

define view entity ZCUS_I_MaterialVH as select from I_MaterialVH

{

key Material,

MaterialType
}

entry.title: Creating Multi Tenant Application within BTP ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Currently I have requirement where I need to use one ABAP Environment and Fiori apps are build on it, I need to make it as multi tenant saas application, but if I make it as said, the changes to the UI and Backend will be reflected to all, is there a possibility to use the same system and provide multi tenancy and also to maintain different UI for different customers at the same time. Currently we are using Build Workzone but now we are deploying it to ABAP System.

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content: To answer Q1: An out-of-the-box filter option is available. Users can access the filter action via a button in the action bar or toolbar, which opens a filter page from the list (Object Table) page. On this filter page, users can select their desired criteria, which are then applied to the list page. A clear example can be found in the MDK Demo Application in the sample repository: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-mdk-samples/tree/main/Sample_Applications/MDK_Demo_Application By tapping the "All Products" link under the Promotion Items section in the upper right corner, users can access a Filter button that initiates the filter action, allowing them to effectively choose and apply their selections.

entry.title: Production Order Settlement Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We want to settle production order costs in 8th period. However, we did not make a settlement in the 7th period (it was a mistake).

The system does not allow settlement in  8th period, we faced that error "Balance of order 700000 must be settled for the previous period 007 first"

The 7th period is closed. How can we pass this error? I want to settle only 8th period now, not 7.

 

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Unable to retrieve data from OData API for Reports from SAP Business ByDesing to SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

Data is missing when importing data from SAP Business ByDesign Analytics in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

This issue is happening only for a few reports created on top of a join data source FINGLAU04 (Financial Statement) and CRMCIVIB (Customer Invoice Item) for example.

Connection name: CC_HOME_ANALYTICS

Connection description: CC_Home_Analytics

We are using a business user with all work centers authorisation access and rights. 

Connection works for most of the data sources exposed in ByD and standard and custom reports. 

Data is missing when importing data from SAP Business ByDesign Analytics in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

Has anyone experienced the same issue trying to retrieve data from FINGLAU04 Financial Statement (Basic Data Source) from Business ByDesign into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)?

Kind regards,

Sergio

entry.title: Functional Specification Document (FSD)
entry.content:
Functional Specification Document in SAP

Functional Specification Document outlines the requirements for a specific function or enhancement, detailing what is needed from both a functional and technical perspective. The FSD acts as a communication tool between business stakeholders and technical teams.

Key roles of the FSD in SAP:

  1. Requirements Documentation: It helps capture & document all the business requirements and expectations for a particular enhancement or project.
  2. Blueprint for Development: The FSD provides developers with specific guidelines on how to implement the requested functionality or change. This clarity can significantly reduce the risk of miscommunication during the development phase.
  3. Basis for Testing: An FSD serves as a reference point for testing the developed functionality, ensuring that the solution meets the initially stated requirements.
  4. Change Management: It helps in managing changes by providing a documented reference that can be analyzed when future modifications or enhancements are proposed.

How FSD is Useful for Enhancements in SAP:

  1. Clarity & Focus: By presenting a focused view of the enhancement's objectives, the FSD helps prevent scope creep & ensures that all stakeholders stay aligned.
  2. Reduced Errors & Rework: A comprehensive FSD minimizes the risk of misunderstandings & errors during both development & testing.

How to Create a Functional Specification Document (FSD):

  1. Engage Stakeholders: Initiate discussions with relevant stakeholders to gather information about their requirements & expectations.
  2. Document Requirements: Clearly outline the business needs, including specific functionalities & processes affected by the enhancement.
  3. Define Functional Details: Elaborate on functional requirements, including use cases, screen layouts, workflows & reports.
  4. Technical Specifications: Collaborate with technical teams to translate functional requirements into technical specifications, including data models, interfaces & integration points.
  5. Approval Process: Ensure that the FSD undergoes a review & approval process involving all key stakeholders to confirm its accuracy & completeness
  6. Version Control: Manage versions of the FSD appropriately, especially when changes or updates are required.

entry.title: Re: Start Your scripting Journey The Easy Way With SAP Analytics Cloud | Part Three
entry.content:
@sabananthan  can you not simply create a date filter with a month offset of -1 to give you the previous month? Take a 12 month dataset as the one below...

This is with no filter... so you need to add an offset filter based on date as shown below:

Once this is applied you get "Last Months" date set automatically as the filter when you open the story and it will change each month as it always looks back 1 month. Output of the story can be seen below...

If this is not what you want reach out to me directly and we'll see if I can help.

Daniel

entry.title: Copy Attachments from One Parent Entity Record to another.
entry.content:
Hi All.

We are having a business case scenario, where we need to copy attachments of one parent entity to another. We have developed the RAP Services in BTP ABAP ENV(Steampunk) and utilizing custom Fiori to consume them. I want to copy attachments of one Parent entity record to another. Is there any way I can do it in the controller.

 Steps to reproduce.
1. Develop RAP Service with two entities. First Entity with few fields and the second entity with MediaType(Attachment Entity).
2. Give Relation with Header to Item with First Entity Parent to Second(Attachment Entity).
3.Now Develop a custom Fiori application to create a record and attachments.
4. Now create a function to copy the first record along with attachments.

entry.title: Native Integration of Genesys(on premise) with SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: we are using SAP S/4 HANA with built in CE in utilities 2302. I want to know if there is some native integration of Genesys 8.2.1 with the SAP. If not, then what is best way to integrate genesys. We want to use dial pad for outbound call and want to use basic toolbar for receiving and ending the call.

entry.title: Onboarding | Username creation before Employee Data Collection
entry.content:
Hello,

 

we're trying to migrate from Onboarding 1.0 to Onboarding.

With ONB 1.0 we had the Manage Pending Hires step configured to be the first Onboarding step before the Employee Data Collection, because in MPH the username is created which doubles as personnell number that we need for contract creation.

This is because the contract should be sent to the Onboardee as soon as possible and so that business users are independent of the time the Onboardee needs to complete their data input.

 

Is there a possibility in Onboarding as well to have the username creation before the Employee Data Collection?

Or if not, a possibility to have the username creation be independent of the Onboardee input time?

 

Thanks in advance & kind regards,
Luisa

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Re: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello @Yunikean2206 

By definition batch is homogenous - see SAP Glossary

The total quantity of a material that has been created under uniform conditions.

 

A quantity of a material produced during a given production run. The main characteristic of a batch is its homogeneity. A production lot can consist of one or more batches.

Therefore one batch can have one production date only. You do need three different batches.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Asset transfer (value adjustment)
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have been transfer asset no. To another asset no. At same company code using TC#ABUMN i have notice something when i transfer the amount from old asset no. To new asset no. the NBV for new asset no. became lower and i notice the diff. Goes to field name “value adjustment” my inquiry is : 

1- how i transfer asset next time with right way without any value adjustment 

2- how i correct the value adjustment that is appear in asset explorer AS03 for new asset ?

entry.title: Re: Issues with Quick Confirm in Perform Maintenance Jobs
entry.content:
I ran into this issue again today.

By adding the column Remaining Effort to the view, I could do Quick confirm.

Like it was not calculated before I pressed Quick Confirm first time.

entry.title: External links fields naming on NWBC logon screen
entry.content:
Hi all. I'd like to ask for community help in order to find where the fields I'll describe bellow have their data stored or where the fields naming are created.

In SICF>NWBC>"&Service&">Error Pages>Logon Errors>Configuration>System Logon Configuration>Adjust Links and Images

We have the following fields as shown in yellow below:

These same fields, when filled, are visible in NWBC logon page as below:

I need to know where these field names are determined or stored.

I was able to identify the package SICF_EXT_LOGIN, but after checking all coding and debuged, I still haven't found them. If anyone has a hint I'd appreciate greatly.

I'm working in an SRM 701-SP19 and NW7.01-SP11

SAP NETWEAVER SAP EHP2 FOR SAP NETWEAVER 7.0

Thanks in advance for all inputs.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields on Routing Steps in Order Download
entry.content: @daried

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields on Routing Steps in Order Download
entry.content:
Hi Mike, why do the custom field extensions behave differently depending on which object you want to extend?

With order level & bom header level it is not necessary to define the fields in the “Manage Custom Data” beforehand. They are generated automatically during import if required. (This makes sense because, for example, the VC configuration can be extended independently of the DM and I don't want to rework every single field in the DM).

This does not happen here at routing step level. Each field must be created explicitly first.

Best regards

There it doesn't allow to put URL parameters as string but rather as a name value pair. Also the parameter name is mandatory. I tried and this worked - router parses is properly and app lands in the desired view:

entry.title: SAC modelling - field mappings and measures
entry.content:
Hi all,  just after some guidance on the best approach to model data from different sources in SAC.
For example:
Datasource 1 contains:   User ID , Job Title , Department
Datasource 2 contains:    User ID, First name, Last Name
If I create a new model starting with data and pick say source 1 .. when I then try and add
source 2 I'm unable to as of course First name & Last name cannot be mapped to anything.

Option 2 is I create a new model with no data and manually create dimensions for both Sources above,
However SAC forces you to create a measure before allowing you to save and add data......  but as there is no measure in either data source - the mapping also fails so I can't import the data..........

Or am I missing something obvious?
Once the data is in the model in its entirety - that's when I want to create measures

 

Edit - Just for context / clarity the data i'm working with is Success Factors,  hence the need for mutiple queries in SAC as I need data from different tables in SF......

entry.title: Spain: Contribution RAP to SCRAP ("Punto verde")
entry.content:
Hi, I’m looking for guidance or examples on how others have implemented sustainability contributions (like Punto Verde) on customer invoices. How to ensure that the RAP to SCRAP contribution is distinctly identifiable from other charges while adhering to Spanish waste management laws (Royal Decree 1055/2022) and ENVALORA compliance?

Any insights into best practices, configuration suggestions, or technical solutions would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: PostgreSQL | Connect to a PostgreSQL instance on a Kyma environment
entry.content:
To answer to my own question. Service instance binding is actually creating the secrets. Then I was able to use these secrets in my application .yaml. Official source of how you can pass environmental variables to your app:

Kubernetes doc

entry.content:

We have a requirement to map BP group as Internal number range and customer account group as External number range and upload using Data Migration Cockpit. 

We are using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edition. 

We have issues in mapping the BP number range and customer number range in Data Migration cockpit template.

 

Please advise, 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Valid From date is not being considered in CS11 but CK11N is considering it.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have come across a scenario where the system is not considering the Valid From Date of the Production Version in CS11 or its relevant function modules but considering the same in CK11N for Costing.

We can see in the below screenshot, that the Valid From date of the Production Version L1A5 is from 19.09.2024 and the alternative BOM assigned to it is Alternative-5 but in the CS11 screen, we can see different alternative BOM components.

We can see here, that there are 5 components in the Alternative BOM-5.

But in the CS11 t-code, I am getting a correct production version but the Component is being displayed of the alternative BOM-1 only. Here I am getting always alternative BOM-1 for all levels.

In CK11N, I am getting the correct Production Version and the correct alternative BOM-5 with all 5 components.

We are using the S4HANA on Premise 2020 with S4 Core 105.

Please help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Ali

entry.title: Data locking in measures
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m working on a project where I need to lock three specific measures. My model consists of two dimensions and four measures, but I want to ensure that no one can edit three of those measures.

Is there a way to lock these specific measures? What approach should I take to solve this?

Thanks in advance,

GAnjos

entry.title: Re: How can an independent consultant purchase a new 'redesigned' SAP Learning Hub subscription?
entry.content:
Hi @JeanMarcus 
I am not quite sure why you have not been able to purchase the SAP Learning Hub Standard edition license as an individual.
Please note that as an individual purchaser (B2I), customer can only make purchases by accepting SAP B2B Terms & Conditions.
As an individual purchaser, the customer should book the license under an organization (using their name as the company name and their home address as the postal address). For VAT purposes, the customer can use a dummy VAT registration number in their country's specific format.
Please follow the link provided here and fill out the information as mentioned above to proceed with placing the order.
If this does not solve the issue please let me know.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP window frozen after lock windows
entry.content:
Hi PauloF,

It is a known scenario documented in SAP Note 3367331 and 3424945.

In order to resolve the issue, kindly upgrade to the latest available patch.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: SAP Netweaver installation issue - Primary Application Server
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I started do the SAPNW env setup on Linux SLES 15 SP5 os.
I installed ASCS and ERS, DB instance,

while installaing PAS getting below the error.

68%
 
Analyzing log files... This might take several seconds up to a few minutes.
 
 
 

Error

 
 

An error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > High-Availability System > Primary Application Server Instance (Last error reported by the step: Instance TS2/D01 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up). You can now:

  • Choose Retry
    to repeat the current step.
  • Choose Log Files
    to get more information about the error.
  • Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/HA/ABAP/APP1.


Please help me for this issue.

I tried all possible ways with help of internet, but no luck.

 

 

#SAPNW
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server

entry.title: vacancy report

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas Camera IPad Auto focus
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please try the following approach:

  1. When attachment dialog is opened, there are two options: Start Camera and Browse Files
  2. Select Browse files
  3. Select Take Photo or Video
  4. Native camera app will have focus control
  5. Take photo
  6. Select Use Photo
  7. Select created photo in Slipstream Engine and push Confirm

So you have to use Browse Files and then use native camera to access the focus.



Best Regards!

entry.title: How to update LIPS-EXBWR field with external value for batch splitted item while IBD creation.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have requirements to do MIGO with  external value in movement type 503 and not on MAP rate. Plant & storage location is EWM managed.

There is a field MSEG-EXBWR enhanced on MIGO screen. On saving on MIGO screen IBD number is generated.

W.r t IBD there is a process of doing GR in EWM through tcode /n/SCWM/PRDI. GR is done, Warehouse task is created WH Order is created and confirmed to get the GRN number. The GR is posted on MAP value and not the external value entered on MIGO screen.

How to update LIPS-EXBWR on saving of IBD, for the batch splitted line item?

Best Regards,

Narendra

entry.title: Re: MDG Web Dynpro Create Material- Page Header Already Exists
entry.content: Do you have found any resolution on this. Thanks

entry.title: Streamlined Dangerous Goods Regulatory Updates
entry.content:
Two Ways to Receive Updates

Public Cloud customers can now receive new and updated dangerous goods compliance requirement versions (CRV) through two convenient methods:

  1. Mime Repository: For those not using our Content Service, CRV updates can be accessed directly from the Mime Repository.
  2. Regulatory Content Service: CRV updates can be loaded from the Content Service directly into your database tables, making them immediately available in your SAP system.

 Activation Still Required

This user-dependent approach offers you the flexibility to choose the method that best suits. However, using the Activate Compliance Requirements – Dangerous Goods app, you still need to review and activate the new CRV. Otherwise, the new version will be in the system, but not in use.

 Improved Efficiency

Previously, content was packaged with normal S/4HANA system updates approximately 10 times per year, with no alternative options available. This new content delivery method streamlines the process, ensuring you have access to the latest dangerous goods compliance information as soon as it becomes available.

 Future Developments

While this new content delivery method is currently available for public cloud customers, we are actively working on extending this functionality to our private cloud and on-premise customers. Stay tuned for updates found in our Roadmap, as we continue to enhance our services to better serve your needs.

 We are excited to bring you this improved content delivery system and look forward to helping you navigate the complex world of dangerous goods compliance with greater ease and efficiency.

For information on how to set-up the Regulatory Content Service for Public Cloud, see this SAP Note.

For information on how to set-up the Regulatory Content Service for Private Cloud and On-Premise, see this SAP Note.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024

entry.title: How can I use drag and drop in "Schedule Sequence manually" Heuristic in PPDS?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In another company, when we were using "Schedule Sequence manually" Heuristic in PPDS we were able to drag and drop one or multiple orders with the mouse. So we first used some sorting options and then manipulated the result in the spreadsheet manually with the mouse, before we executed the new schedule to the planning board. 

Now in a new company, it seems this is not standard functionality, but was enabled somehow. Does anybody know if there is an OSS note or something that can do this?

Thanks in advance!

Stocki

entry.title: Re: How can I use drag and drop in "Schedule Sequence man...

entry.title: SAP Build version not the same as tutorials.
entry.content: Hi everyone. I am a complete newbie just dipping my toe into the SAP Build world. I am trying to add an API to my app and have watched and read countless tutorials on how to do it. The API i am using works as i have tested it on "POSTMAN" with no issues. The problem i have is that my interface does not correspond to the one in the tutorials. I click the "Data" tab, all good. I click on "Create Data Entity" but, the option i get is "Universal REST api Integration", and not" REST Api Integration" as shown in all the tutorials i have seen/read. The input fields it provides do not correspond to the tutorials either and only allow a base URL. I am on the community edition. when i first started using it, all the fields complemented the training, but it then suddenly changed and now only have the "universal "option. Have i inadvertently changed something or does the community addition have restricted functionality? any help/advice or guidance would be gratefully received to help me move forward. Thanks very much in advance

entry.title: Re: How to get URL parameters in SAP Screen Personas
entry.content:
For me similar URL works. So just check what happens with "window.location", then "window.location.search" and so on.

Maybe you are using not supported browser.

There is an example:

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial RAP - GUI access
entry.content:
@Shky Please use the Feedback button and then contribute in the tutorial itself. 

This will create an issue that will go to the tutorial author directly. Otherwise the tutorial author might not see this thread.

entry.title: Where can I get the skills to use monitor and performance tools within SAP HANA Cockpit?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Using Monitoring and Performance Tools in SAP HANA learning journey

Overview
This SAP Learning Journey equips you with skills to use monitor and performance tools, troubleshoot performance issues, investigate SQL statements, address hardware performance issues, manage workload, and use capture and replay using SAP HANA cockpit. You will gain practical knowledge through hands-on exercises and real-world scenarios. By the end, you'll be proficient in investigating system performance within your organization. Get ready to embark on this exciting and comprehensive journey!

Learning objectives

  • Develop proficiency in using monitor and performance tools within SAP HANA Cockpit for effective system performance analysis.
  • Acquire the skills to troubleshoot performance issues, including investigating SQL statements and addressing hardware performance issues.
  • Gain expertise in workload management to ensure efficient system operation and resource utilization.
  • Learn how to utilize capture and replay functionalities to simulate and analyze system workloads, enabling informed decisions for performance improvements.

Prerequisites

  • Installing and Administering SAP HANA

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: @mwn - Consider using the Feedback button and then choosing contribute in the tutorial itself.  That's the best way to communicate this directly with the tutorial author.

entry.title: Re: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Iam able to get the csrf token using the get request and iam passing it to the post request to insert data but it is giving the error as 403 csrf token validation failed.

but the same above process is working in the post-man.

and in some documentation some mentioned to use the cookie in the post request which we got from the get request but for me this cookie is not getting exposed in my response header.

iam using the approuter to solve the CORS issue

Here is mta yml file

 

modules:
- name: testing-approuter
  type: approuter.nodejs
  path: testing-approuter
  properties:
     
      CORS:
        - uriPattern: "/"
          allowedMethods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          allowedOrigin:
            - host: '*'
          maxAge: 3600
          allowedHeaders:
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - X-CSRF-Token
            - Accept
            - set-cookie
            - Cookie

          exposeHeaders:
            - X-CSRF-Token
            - vary
            - set-cookie
          allowedCredentials : true
     
  parameters:
    keep-existing-routes: true
    disk-quota: 256M
    memory: 256M
  requires:
  - name: test-destination
  - name: test-connectivity
resources:
- name: test-destination
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: destination
    service-plan: lite
- name: test-connectivity
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: connectivity
    service-plan: lite

entry.title: Mass changes to field " Person Responsible" in Cost centers in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi ,

Could anybody advise if there is any app available in SAP Public cloud to perform mass changes to Cost Centers for field "Person Responsible"

While there are many apps available for Mass changes, I am unable to find any app specifically for Cost center mass changes

Your valuable inputs will be of great help!

Thanks in advance

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to open simulation test mode in a new browser tab?
entry.content: It depends on where you are opening it from. If the object you are linking it from, and the simulation itself are hierarchically below the same structure that was originally opened (i.e. in the same Book) then it will open in a virtual tab. If you want to force it to open in a new browser window, select the Open in New Window option for the link, and that should do it. (But if you are trying to do this from the playback button for the simulation mode, then no not possible without building your own launch page.)

entry.title: Re: PurRqs will be generated when Available Qty -1000 always
entry.content: One last idea - is there any discontinuation information in MRP 4. If there is - that could be another rootcause. If not, I will not be able to help.

entry.title: Re: How to create a curriculum with item A and following item B with retraining?
entry.content: I would think you would want to develop 2 curriculums for this. First for users who haven't completed Item A, then for those that 'have' completed Item A. The assignment profile includes an Item matches or Item Doesnt match option. -- At least that is probably be how I would do it.

entry.title: Re: Start Your scripting Journey The Easy Way With SAP Analytics Cloud | Part Three
entry.content:
no Daniel this is not what i need 

Let me explain more...

let's imagine now i have a dash board showing some data (amount spent by some customers )

  • measure: money
  • dimension: customer name

now i have 2 input controls: year and Month

Month filter has all the values Jan - Aug in September 2024 (cause until Aug the data were loaded)

my need is always when I'm loading the dashboard or open every time Month input control should be checked with the prior month like before the completed posting month in this case it should checked by default July.

 

and it should be dynamically happen for every month. 

is it possible by Scripting using any [ID]'s

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

Hope this message finds you well.

My name is Ahmed Bekhet, and I am from Egypt. I have recently Complete my learning journey in the SAP field, Please review the attached screenshot of my progress.

Thank you for your time and assistance. 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content: @JanWidmer Doc is right, full page caching in SSR is not recommended. Native Composable Storefront SSR doesn't have cache for subroutine. Yes, I'm talking OCC response + processing as BaseSites computation. This can be setup in cache to optimise SSR response time for all rendering pages.

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite (CPI) Synchronous Proxy with Attachment Error
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/integration-suite-cpi-synchronous-proxy-with-attachment-error/qaq-p/13752616

entry.title: Re: Is there some release news in Community 2024? (fixes,...
entry.content: Oops, it was just in front of my eyes. Thanks! I can't find any post about the username length and the delete button. I'd love to see all the details like in https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-for-eclipse-release-notes/release-notes-of-abap-development-tools-for-eclipse.

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite (CPI) Synchronous Proxy with Attach...
entry.content:
Hi, did u found any solution for this?

thanks

entry.title: Navigation to URL in RAP
entry.content:
Hi Community,

 

We would like to have a navigation to an external URL in RAP list report. First option is obvious and it works properly: Use a column in list with annotation: type: #WITH_URL

But we would like to add some extra possibilities: Use some code to create several url's and launch them with only one click. In old ECC systems, we have cl_gui_frontend_services=>execute that easily solve this issue and we thought it would be great to use something similar inside a RAP Action. Unfortunately, that class is not supported in Public Cloud.

 

Is there any workaround to perform this navigation via code?

 

Thanks a lot,

Kr,

Agustín.

Agustín.

entry.title: Re: Need to find BOM chang history CDS View for changes d...
entry.content:
Hello @pdattatray 

 

For BOM Change Documents we have the  app 'Display Change Documents' ( App Id CA_SHOW_CD ) allows the viewing of the change documents from CDHDR/CDPOS

 If you run it with Change Document Object : STUE it will show you the change documents for BOM's

 

An email notification for BOM changes is not available in S/4HANA Cloud . There is the functionality of "Change Records" you can use instead

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
@mahesh_varma  - . We are getting 401 error when used the same access token for Production system too which is used for Non-prod testing. Is JWT Token same for Non-Prod and Prod connectivity to RO Tax portal? As I don't see a separate ROMANIA Prod Tax portal authentication URL's, can you please suggest the steps to generate the Access token for Production connectivity?

Thanks in advance,

Veera

entry.title: Re: My favourite SAP Cloud Integration feature: JMS queues
entry.content:
Great Article!

Is there any way to link the jms queues of an edge cell and the main runtime of the cloud integration?

I did not found any solution to link iflows directly with an "internal" mechanism.

entry.title: Material Inspection in Warehouse Advance Return Management
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are using advance return management in ECC to inspect the materials for return inbound deliveries via

MSR_INSPWH tcode.

It works fine if we have all same materials and same batch in same HU.

e.g Mat XYZ and Batch XYZ in same HU.

But if return delivery have multiple HU's and same material batches are in other HU it gives error

 

Please let me know if anyone of you have came across similar issue ?

Thank you in advance.

regards,

Ricky

entry.title: Re: Insufficient privileges to perform this action. - SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I had the same problem. Solved by assigning roles. 
BR Dmitrii

entry.title: Re: Enriching Readings from MQTT Sensors with the Applicable Manufacturing Context
entry.content: Hi Sayuj, I didn't do this part of the set up myself but was relying on an existing setup. Therefore, I have added the relevant links to the SAP Help Portal, which explain this part of the setup. If the information in there isn't helpful, please create a ticket and the respective developers will help you with it.

entry.title: Time Calculation Data Action - From To Period
entry.content:
Hello

I need to make a data action that deletes data in a specific period using the date parameters  [p/LockedFrom] and [p/LockedTo] on the site dimension [d/Site].

Any ideas how to achieve this?

entry.title: Messages between Iflows from different Runtimes
entry.content:
Hi there,

is there a way to send/receive messages from one runtime to another with an "internal" method.

I would like to get incoming requests from the cloud integration runtime. Ideally i could address the message via jms or ProcessDirect to route it to the runtime of the edge integration cell. I don't want to use an extra instance of an cloud connector for that matter. This would cost extra ressources and extra messages would be applied. 

Are there any solutions?

Kind regards,

Florian

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hi @RG20 

I have tried with below SQL script view in Datasphere pointing to a Snowflake view.

DECLARE myArticleString NVARCHAR(5000) = '000000000010347199';

return select "MATERIAL" from "V_ORDER_FORECAST" where "MATERIAL" in (myArticleString);

This worked more or less as expected generating the following query on the Snowflake DB:

SELECT "V_ORDER_FORECAST$VT"."MATERIAL" FROM "FORECASTING"."V_ORDER_FORECAST" "V_ORDER_FORECAST$VT" WHERE ("V_ORDER_FORECAST$VT"."MATERIAL" = '000000000010347199')

So the "In" is converted to "=" which does not matter for a single article. 

However, I have not yet succeeded in pushing a dynamic in-string list of multiple articles, (which could be populated dynamically based on eg an excel upload). I have tried variations over below SQL script view.

I would like to avoid having to hardcode lots of articles into the view but instead reading them from another table. If someone should succeed with that, I would love to hear about it, thanks 🙂

DECLARE myArticleString NVARCHAR(50000);

myArticleString = '''000000000086640951'',''000000000010519311''';

return select "MATERIAL" from "V_ORDER_FORECAST" where "PLANT" = '1399' AND "RUNDATE" = '20240821' AND "MATERIAL" in (:myArticleString);

Br.

Michael

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Thanks, Mani and Vignesh for this insightful session. Helped reinforce clean core principles as well as RAP fundamentals. Keep up the good work!

Couple of misses that could have added more value to the session:
1. Processes of C1 releasing a wrapper

2. ATC checks and governance process

3. Demo of the wrapper generator you talked about initially

Additionally, reiterating what others have requested:
1. Access to the code repo

2. Presentation

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Interchangeability groups in MRP Area
entry.content:
Hi all,

i have a requirement regarding interchangeability groups in MRP Area.

Is it possible to use the concept of the Interchangeability group in the same Plant but in different mrp areas?

Kind regards,

Max

entry.title: Re: SA 17.0.10.5866: Can't call my Web service, error “40...
entry.content: Ah, I forgot about that limitation... - but basically, why would you need to use a web request to access data from the same database. 🙂
